title: ononis spinosa subsp. leiosperma
intro: Ononis spinosa subsp. leiosperma, also known as the broom-spurred restharrow, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating urinary issues and soothing joint pain. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa subsp. leiosperma include its ability to reduce water retention, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to harness its medicinal properties.
